title: ZeroMind install matrix
description: Per-harness install instructions consumed by the ZeroMind UI's 'bring your own agent' screen. One entry per harness drives one row of the harness dropdown.

version.description: Source npm package version this matrix was generated from.

id.description: Stable identifier matching the `zeromind install <id>` CLI subcommand.

display_name.description: User-facing name for the dropdown row.

category.description: Used to group rows in the dropdown.

icon_hint.description: UI uses this to pick an icon; not a real URL.

tools_available.description: Whether the agent in this harness can CALL zeromind.* tools. Aider and (in some modes) Copilot are instructions-only.

tools_note.description: Explainer to show when tools_available is false or limited.

prerequisites.description: Display as a checklist next to the install command.

alternatives.description: Other native install paths (marketplace, deeplink, snippet). Surface as a 'show alternatives' disclosure.

native_channel.description: Short description of the harness-native channel ZeroMind plugs into.

kind.description: How the UI should render this step.

command.description: For kind=shell: the one-liner. Render as a copyable code block.

steps.description: For kind=in-app-command: list of slash commands to run inside the harness.

url.description: For kind=deeplink or kind=marketplace: where to link.

snippet.description: For kind=config-snippet: the JSON/YAML/TOML block to paste.

post_install_note.description: Show under the command block after the user copies it.
